text: Imagine a fungus that turns ants into zombies. Meet Ophiocordyceps, a parasitic fungus that invades carpenter ants. Once infected, the ant's behavior changes dramatically, driven to climb vegetation. It grips the plant tightly, ensuring its body is ready for spore release. The fungus then erupts from the ant, spreading spores to continue its cycle. Fascinated by nature’s bizarre behaviors? Follow for more strange science!
